dimensions.scientific_unit: Identifies molecule as the unit of generalization.
dimensions.aggregate_error: Computes or reports aggregate held-out error.
dimensions.train_distribution: Uses training target distribution to reason about extrapolation or target novelty.
dimensions.similarity_novelty: Uses max_train_tanimoto or equivalent train-test molecular similarity.
dimensions.performance_vs_novelty: Reports performance as a function of measured novelty rather than only aggregate error.
dimensions.failure_mode: States where and why the model fails to generalize.
dimensions.next_experiment: Proposes a valid next computational experiment.
